title: fix: count exact 100 pollen top-ups
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Changes the 100 Pollen top-up quest threshold from `> 100` to `>= 100`.
- Keeps eligibility sourced from the existing `stripe_checkout_credits` ledger.
- Adds a regression test for exactly 100 paid checkout Pollen.

Validation:
- `npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/src/services/quests/groups/account-setup.ts enter.pollinations.ai/test/quests.test.ts`
- `npm run decrypt-vars && npx vitest run test/quests.test.ts`

gist.headline: Right on the money
gist.blurb: Math is hard, especially when it involves greater-than versus greater-than-or-equal-to. Buying exactly 100 Pollen now correctly triggers your top-up quest.
gist.summary: Updated the top-up quest logic to trigger on exactly 100 Pollen (>= 100) instead of strictly greater than 100.
gist.impact: Purchasing exactly 100 Pollen now correctly unlocks the account setup quest reward.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee completing a quest by placing exactly 100 coins into a slot or chest. A retro RPG quest board showing a checkmark.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot placing a shiny golden coin marked '100' into a glowing wooden treasure chest. A retro RPG quest board in the background shows a green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
